seats.scope: orchestration, the file-scoped atomic land across surfaces, human liaison
the first app surface (rename per surface — e.g. the web app); owns its stack end-to-end
the second app surface (rename per surface — e.g. the mobile app); owns its stack end-to-end
the shared package both surfaces depend on — the contract seam between surfaces
integration across surfaces against the shared contract — drives the assembled surfaces
